crystallize.go emits events to Stream 1 (discovery) and Stream 2 (specification) as primary writes; file write is projection. Annotation: ddis:implements APP-INV-088
diff.go StructuralDiff() compares content-only fields excluding auto-IDs/timestamps. StateHash() computes deterministic SHA-256. Annotation: ddis:implements APP-INV-089
events/models.go NewEvent() generates monotone timestamps (RFC3339) + unique random event IDs (evt-YYYYMMDD-{hex}). Causes DAG enforces causal ordering. Annotation: ddis:implements APP-INV-094
storage/schema.go snapshots table has state_hash TEXT NOT NULL column. diff.go StateHash() computes SHA-256 over canonical content tables. Annotation: ddis:implements APP-INV-095
tests/roundtrip_test.go TestRoundTripMonolith + TestRoundTripModular verify parse→render fidelity with content hash comparison. Annotation: ddis:implements APP-INV-097
